L0.name: Introduce Yourself
L0.description: Record yourself introducing yourself in English (30+ seconds)
L0.description_ar: سجل نفسك وانت بتعرف نفسك بالإنجليزي (30 ثانية على الأقل)
L0.challenge: Say: your name, where you're from, what you do, and one thing you like.

L0.name: Count to 100
L0.description: Count from 1 to 100 without pausing more than 2 seconds
L0.description_ar: عد من 1 لحد 100 من غير ما توقف أكتر من ثانيتين

L0.name: Describe Your Room
L0.description: Describe 5 objects in your room in English
L0.challenge: Point to 5 things and describe them: color, size, what they're for.

L0.name: Order Food
L0.description: Role-play ordering food at a restaurant
L0.description_ar: مثّل إنك بتطلب أكل في مطعم
L0.challenge: Imagine you're at a restaurant. Order a meal, ask about the menu, and say thank you.

L0.name: Spell Your Name
L0.description: Spell your full name letter by letter clearly
L0.description_ar: هجّي اسمك الكامل حرف حرف بوضوح
L0.challenge: Say: 'My name is [name], that's spelled [letter by letter]'

L1.name: Tell Your Day
L1.description: Tell a 2-minute story about what you did today
L1.description_ar: احكي قصة دقيقتين عن اللي عملته النهاردة
L1.challenge: Describe your day from morning to now. What did you do? How did you feel?

L1.name: Explain a Recipe
L1.description: Explain how to cook your favorite food step by step
L1.description_ar: اشرح إزاي تعمل أكلتك المفضلة خطوة بخطوة
L1.challenge: Explain a recipe as if teaching someone who's never cooked before.

L1.name: Phone Conversation
L1.description: Have a 3-minute phone-style conversation with a partner
L1.description_ar: اعمل محادثة تليفونية 3 دقايق مع شريك
L1.challenge: Call your conversation partner and discuss weekend plans.

L1.name: Explain the News
L1.description: Read a simple news headline and explain what it means
L1.description_ar: اقرأ عنوان خبر بسيط واشرح معناه
L1.challenge: Find an English news headline. Read it aloud, then explain it in your own words.

L1.name: Give Directions
L1.description: Give directions from your home to a nearby landmark
L1.description_ar: وصّف الطريق من بيتك لمكان قريب معروف
L1.challenge: Imagine someone asks you how to get to [place]. Give clear directions.

L2.name: 5-Minute Presentation
L2.description: Give a 5-minute presentation on any topic you choose
L2.description_ar: اعمل عرض 5 دقايق عن أي موضوع تختاره
L2.challenge: Choose a topic you're passionate about. Present it as if to a small audience.

L2.name: Debate a Topic
L2.description: Debate a topic for 3 minutes (argue one side convincingly)
L2.description_ar: ناقش موضوع لمدة 3 دقايق (دافع عن وجهة نظر واحدة)
L2.challenge: Topic: 'Social media does more harm than good.' Argue FOR or AGAINST.

L2.name: Write an Essay
L2.description: Write a 300-word essay without using a translator
L2.description_ar: اكتب مقال 300 كلمة من غير مترجم
L2.challenge: Topic: 'The most important lesson I learned this year.' 300+ words, no translator.

L2.name: Explain a Complex Concept
L2.description: Explain something complex in simple English (ELI5 style)
L2.challenge: Explain how [the internet / gravity / a smartphone] works to a 5-year-old.

L2.name: Mock Job Interview
L2.description: Answer 5 common job interview questions fluently
L2.description_ar: جاوب على 5 أسئلة مقابلة عمل شائعة بطلاقة
L2.challenge: Answer: Tell me about yourself / Why should we hire you? / Where do you see yourself in 5 years? / What's your greatest weakness? / Do you have any questions?
